recommendations.title: Kitchen with Apartment
recommendations.overview: Jacques and Martine, an ordinary bourgeois couple, invite to dinner a friend whom they have not seen the last ten years. Since then he has become a media star and everything has to go just right at dinner.

recommendations.title: Aline
recommendations.overview: A fictionalized biopic of Aline Dieu, a multitalented singer from a musically inclined family.

recommendations.title: U.S. Marshals
recommendations.overview: U.S. Marshal Sam Gerard is accompanying a plane load of convicts from Chicago to New York. The plane crashes spectacularly, and Mark Sheridan escapes. But when Diplomatic Security Agent John Royce is assigned to help Gerard recapture Sheridan, it bec

recommendations.title: Marie-Francine
recommendations.overview: A woman at the age of 50 moves back in with her parents after her husband leave her for a younger woman.

recommendations.title: The Ultimate Accessory
recommendations.overview: The story of Aleksandra and Cyrille, a prominent, trendy, and very well-off Parisian couple, whose life is not quite the same after seven-year-old Alekseï from Russia suddenly pops up in their 100% cashmere, childless home. Aleksandra soon realises t

recommendations.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
recommendations.overview: Ten years after the events of the original, a reprogrammed T-800 is sent back in time to protect young John Connor from the shape-shifting T-1000. Together with his mother Sarah, he fights to stop Skynet from triggering a nuclear apocalypse.

recommendations.title: Emmanuelle
recommendations.overview: An employee at the French Embassy in Bangkok invites his wife to join him – and enjoy the benefits of their open marriage.

recommendations.title: The 4th Man
recommendations.overview: Morbid Catholic writer Gerard Reve–bisexual, alcoholic, and experiencing frequent visions of death–is invited to give a lecture at the Vlissingen literature club. While in the Amsterdam railway station, he's attracted to a handsome man who embarks on

recommendations.title: Dinner for One
recommendations.overview: A very old woman wants to have dinner with her friends. As they are all dead, the butler has to play the role of every guest.

recommendations.title: The Ones Below
recommendations.overview: A young affluent couple expecting their first child hits it off with the new couple that moves in downstairs, until a dinner party between them ends in a shocking accident.
